heroSubtitle: AI-powered support tailored for your needs. Get instant answers, automate workflows, and resolve issues faster than ever.
howItWorksNote: Click the chat widget in the bottom right to try it out.

questions.title: General Support
items: How do I get started with the platform?
How do I submit a support ticket?
What resources are available before opening a case?

questions.title: Workflow Coverage
items: How do I update my billing information?
I need to change the address on my account.
I want to cancel my subscription.
How do I manage user permissions?

problems.title: Ticket Overload
problems.description: 50-150 tickets per day with only 4 technicians. Your team is stretched thin and response times suffer.

problems.title: Repetitive Requests
problems.description: ~50% of tickets are mundane, repetitive questions that could be self-served—if employees could find the answers.

problems.title: Hidden Knowledge
problems.description: Knowledge lives in scattered docs and people's heads. Employees can't discover what they need.

problems.title: Manual Classification & Triage
problems.description: Tickets sit in queue waiting to be read, categorized, and assigned to the right group—eating up valuable response time.

problems.title: Manual Follow-ups & Approvals
problems.description: License and access requests require chasing managers for approval. No automatic reminders—just manual email ping-pong.
